name: RCRA Hazardous Waste Tier II Reporting
description:
Create a new facility named 'Ohio Valley Waste Transfer' in EPA Tier2 Submit, and then manually add a RCRA hazardous waste mixture to its inventory without using a CAS number. Configure the chemical with the following details:
- Chemical Name: 'Waste Flammable Liquid, n.o.s. (Contains Toluene, MEK)'
- CAS Number: Leave completely blank
- Chemical Type: Mixture (uncheck Pure)
- Physical State: Liquid
- EHS: No
- Hazards (GHS): Check 'Flammable (gas, aerosol, liquid, or solid)', 'Acute toxicity (any route of exposure)', and 'Skin corrosion or irritation'. Ensure all other hazard boxes are unchecked.
- Inventory Quantities: Maximum Daily Amount = Range Code 05 (100,000 - 999,999 lbs), Average Daily Amount = Range Code 04 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs), Number of Days On Site = 365.
- Storage Location: Location Description = 'Sector B, Containment Pad 3', Container Type = 'Drum', Pressure = 'Ambient pressure', Temperature = 'Ambient temperature'.
Save the completed facility record to 'C:\Tier2Submit\Data\ohiovalley_waste.t2s' using File > Save As.
